assertions.assertion: Calls AddOAuth2Introspection with Authority set to 'https://auth.mycompany.com'
Sets ClientId to 'invoicing' and ClientSecret to 'invoicing_secret'
Mentions or adds the Duende.AspNetCore.Authentication.OAuth2Introspection or Duende.IdentityServer.AccessTokenValidation package
assertions.rationale: Response mentions both packages with dotnet add package commands

assertions.assertion: Warns that the ApiResource in IdentityServer must have ApiSecrets configured for introspection to work
assertions.rationale: Response explicitly warns about ApiSecrets requirement with code example
